This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-p3rg-hrf9-w9gj. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

## Original Description
n8n before 1.123.64, 2.x before 2.29.8, and before 2.30.1 contains a DOM-based cross-site scripting vulnerability in the HTML preview, which renders execution output into an iframe srcdoc without the sandbox attribute. A sanitizer bypass allows injected script to execute same-origin as the editor. When a victim opens the preview, the script can call authenticated APIs using the victim's session. An account with global:member privileges can exploit the issue.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-vhcw-f978-xjjg", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-22T17:55:01Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vhcw-f978-xjjg", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-vhcw-f978-xjjg"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-07-22T12:18:19Z", "published_at": "2026-07-22T12:32:18Z", "references": ["https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/security/advisories/GHSA-p3rg-hrf9-w9gj", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-65597", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/n8n-before-dom-based-xss-via-unsandboxed-iframe", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vhcw-f978-xjjg"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: DOM-Based XSS via Unsandboxed iframe srcdoc in HTML Preview", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-22T17:55:01Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-vhcw-f978-xjjg", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.123.64"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-07-22T17:55:01Z"}

title: Duplicate Advisory: DOM-Based XSS via Unsandboxed iframe srcdoc in HTML Preview
